title: Crispy Sweet Australian Beet Salad
description: A vibrant, sweet and crispy beet salad with a light soda water vinaigrette, perfect for meal‑prep and vegetarian palettes.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200°C (400°F). Toss whole beets with a pinch of sea salt and bake on parchment paper for 45‑60 minutes or until tender. Cool, peel, and cut into wedges.
Whisk together sugar, soda water, olive oil, apple cider vinegar, sea salt, pepper, and smoked paprika in a small bowl until the sugar dissolves.
Toss the beet wedges with the vinaigrette and refrigerate for at least 20 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
While the beets chill, toast the roasted chickpeas in the oven at 200°C for 5 minutes until crisp, then set aside.
Arrange beet wedges on a serving platter, sprinkle with toasted chickpeas, sesame seeds, and chopped parsley. Drizzle any remaining dressing over the top before serving.
